languages.text: "А на что она похожа? Злобная, огромная тварь. Всюду тянет свои отростки и пытается нас сожрать. Так было, сколько себя помню". {n}Щеки Батошски багровеют, и он на миг замолкает, пережидая прилив ярости. Когда он вновь заговаривает, его голос звучит почти спокойно.{/n} "Мы люди простые. Нам важнее знать, как пережить встречу с Погонщицей, чем понимать, откуда она взялась".

traits.locale_text: "А на что она похожа? Злобная, огромная тварь. Всюду тянет свои отростки и пытается нас сожрать. Так было, сколько себя помню". {n}Щеки Батошски багровеют, и он на миг замолкает, пережидая прилив ярости. Когда он вновь заговаривает, его голос звучит почти спокойно.{/n} "Мы люди простые. Нам важнее знать, как пережить встречу с Погонщицей, чем понимать, откуда она взялась".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."
languages.original_text: "А на что она похожа? Злобная, огромная тварь. Всюду тянет свои отростки и пытается нас сожрать. Нам важнее знать, как пережить встречу с Погонщицей, чем понимать, откуда она взялась".

languages.text: «En cuanto a su aspecto, es un monstruo salvaje y colosal. Extiende sus zarcillos por todas partes para intentar devorarnos. Lleva siendo así desde que tengo uso de razón». {n}Las mejillas de Batoshski se sonrojan y guarda silencio hasta que su ira remite. Cuando retoma la palabra, casi parece tranquilo.{/n} «Somos gente sencilla. Lo que necesitamos es saber cómo sobrevivir a un encuentro con el Pastor, no de dónde viene».
languages.original_text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."

traits.locale_text: «En cuanto a su aspecto, es un monstruo salvaje y colosal. Extiende sus zarcillos por todas partes para intentar devorarnos. Lleva siendo así desde que tengo uso de razón». {n}Las mejillas de Batoshski se sonrojan y guarda silencio hasta que su ira remite. Cuando retoma la palabra, casi parece tranquilo.{/n} «Somos gente sencilla. Lo que necesitamos es saber cómo sobrevivir a un encuentro con el Pastor, no de dónde viene».

languages.text: “还有它长什么样？那是一只庞大而凶残的怪物。它的触须伸得到处都是，整天想把我们都吞了。打我记事起，就是这样了。”{n}巴托什斯基的脸颊涨得通红，他沉默了一会儿，等待怒火平息。再开口时，他的声音几乎恢复了平静。{/n}“我们都是普通人，只想知道撞见拒生花时该怎么活下来，不会去想它是从哪儿冒出来的。”
languages.original_text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."

traits.locale_text: “还有它长什么样？那是一只庞大而凶残的怪物。它的触须伸得到处都是，整天想把我们都吞了。打我记事起，就是这样了。”{n}巴托什斯基的脸颊涨得通红，他沉默了一会儿，等待怒火平息。再开口时，他的声音几乎恢复了平静。{/n}“我们都是普通人，只想知道撞见拒生花时该怎么活下来，不会去想它是从哪儿冒出来的。”

languages.text: « Vous vous demandez à quoi il ressemble, c'est ça ? À un énorme monstre agressif comme pas deux. Il déploie ses vrilles partout dans l'espoir de nous dévorer. Et c'est ainsi depuis aussi longtemps que je me souvienne. » {n}Batoshski pique un fard et s'interrompt quelques instants en attendant que sa colère reflue. Lorsqu'il reprend la parole, sa voix est presque sereine.{/n} « Nous sommes des gens simples. Nous avons besoin de savoir comment lui survivre, pas de comprendre d'où il vient. »
languages.original_text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous demandez à quoi il ressemble, c'est ça ? À un énorme monstre agressif comme pas deux. Il déploie ses vrilles partout dans l'espoir de nous dévorer. Et c'est ainsi depuis aussi longtemps que je me souvienne. » {n}Batoshski pique un fard et s'interrompt quelques instants en attendant que sa colère reflue. Lorsqu'il reprend la parole, sa voix est presque sereine.{/n} « Nous sommes des gens simples. Nous avons besoin de savoir comment lui survivre, pas de comprendre d'où il vient. »

languages.text: "Bir de neye benzediği sorusu var. Kötücül, devasa bir canavar. Dokunaçlarını her yere uzatıyor, bizi yutmaya çalışıyor. Kendimi bildim bileli hep böyleydi." {n}Batoshski'nin yanakları kıpkırmızı oluyor ve öfke patlamasının geçmesini bekleyerek bir an sessiz kalıyor. Tekrar konuştuğunda sesi sükûnet dolu çıkıyor.{/n} "Biz basit insanlarız. Çoban'ın nereden geldiğini anlamaya değil, onunla karşılaştığımızda nasıl hayatta kalacağımızı bilmemiz gerek."
languages.original_text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."

traits.locale_text: "Bir de neye benzediği sorusu var. Kötücül, devasa bir canavar. Dokunaçlarını her yere uzatıyor, bizi yutmaya çalışıyor. Kendimi bildim bileli hep böyleydi." {n}Batoshski'nin yanakları kıpkırmızı oluyor ve öfke patlamasının geçmesini bekleyerek bir an sessiz kalıyor. Tekrar konuştuğunda sesi sükûnet dolu çıkıyor.{/n} "Biz basit insanlarız. Çoban'ın nereden geldiğini anlamaya değil, onunla karşılaştığımızda nasıl hayatta kalacağımızı bilmemiz gerek."

languages.text: 「そして、その姿は？それは凶暴で巨大な怪物だ。その触手は四方八方に伸び、我々を食おうとする。記憶の限り、それはいつもそうだった。」{n}バトシュスキーの頬は赤く染まり、彼はしばらく沈黙し、怒りの波が去るのを待つ。再び声をあげると、彼の声はほとんど平静だった。「我々は単純な民だ。その起源を理解するのではなく、ドルーバーとの遭遇を生き延びる方法を知りたいのだ。」{/n}
languages.original_text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、その姿は？それは凶暴で巨大な怪物だ。その触手は四方八方に伸び、我々を食おうとする。記憶の限り、それはいつもそうだった。」{n}バトシュスキーの頬は赤く染まり、彼はしばらく沈黙し、怒りの波が去るのを待つ。再び声をあげると、彼の声はほとんど平静だった。「我々は単純な民だ。その起源を理解するのではなく、ドルーバーとの遭遇を生き延びる方法を知りたいのだ。」{/n}

languages.text: "Und wie sieht er aus? Wie ein blutrünstiges, kolossales Monster eben. Seine Tentakel sind überall und er will uns fressen. So ist es, seit ich denken kann." {n}Batoshski läuft rot an und schweigt einen Moment, bis seine aufwallende Wut verflogen ist. Als er weiterspricht, ist seine Stimme fast ruhig.{/n} "Wir sind einfache Leute. Wir müssen wissen, wie man überlebt und dem Treiber begegnet. Woher er kam, interessiert uns nicht."
languages.original_text: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."
